claims.summary: The truncated introspection window did not show whether dynamic-epoch projection completed its dot-product loop.
claims.disposition: verify the complete current projection loop and distinguish source-window truncation from implementation truncation

claims.summary: Dynamic-epoch projection must be deterministic for identical embedding, text, epoch, and chunk inputs.
claims.disposition: verify repeated bit-exact outputs, cross-epoch divergence, and captured fingerprints

claims.summary: The entropy-gated vibrancy smoothstep must begin with no discontinuous pop or nonzero boundary slope.
claims.disposition: verify exact gate, below/above pairs, near-slope, and monotonic smoothstep regressions

claims.summary: Projection fingerprints must deterministically capture projected-value variation and canonical float edge cases.
claims.disposition: verify fingerprint, kernel checksum, canonical float, and repeated-epoch integrity tests
